9c1b813ca60aa7abd4f01f4c1ff1d43d81328f7b.summary: FSA page (令和５年５月26日 / 26 May 2023) reporting the results of public comment on the cabinet order and Cabinet Office ordinances implementing the Reiwa-4 (令和４年) amendment to the Payment Services Act and related laws (令和４年資金決済法等改正). The page states verbatim: 「本件の政令は、令和５年５月23日（火曜）に閣議決定、本日公布されており、令和５年６月１日（木曜）から施行されます。」 -- the cabinet order was approved by Cabinet on 23 May 2023, promulgated the same day, and enters into force 1 June 2023. Under the amended framework, stablecoins of the 'digital-money type' are defined as electronic payment instruments (電子決済手段); issuance is restricted to banks, registered fund transfer service providers, and trust companies (via 特定信託受益権), and intermediation requires registration as an electronic payment instruments exchange service provider (電子決済手段等取引業者). The page itself does not state the amending act's number; that must be separately confirmed from FSA's Diet-bills page or e-Gov before drafting.
9c1b813ca60aa7abd4f01f4c1ff1d43d81328f7b.title: Amended Payment Services Act enters into force: stablecoins regulated as electronic payment instruments (電子決済手段)

c651de6c21486d89f2ce0a03f4174bcf51e9af2b.summary: FSA page (平成29年３月24日 / 24 March 2017) reporting the results of public comment on the cabinet order and Cabinet Office ordinances implementing amendments related to virtual currency exchange service providers (仮想通貨交換業者). The page states verbatim: 「本件の政令は、平成29年３月21日（火）に閣議決定されており、本件の政令及び本件の内閣府令等は本日公布、平成29年４月１日（土）から施行されます（一部は平成29年３月25日施行）。」 -- the cabinet order was approved by Cabinet on 21 March 2017, promulgated the same day, and enters into force 1 April 2017, with some provisions taking effect 25 March 2017. This established Japan's registration regime for virtual currency exchange service providers, among the first national frameworks of its kind following the 2014 Mt. Gox failure. The page does not name the amending statute; that must be separately confirmed from FSA's 190th-session Diet page or e-Gov before drafting.
c651de6c21486d89f2ce0a03f4174bcf51e9af2b.title: Amended Payment Services Act enters into force: registration regime for virtual currency exchange service providers begins
